title: UX standards — sidebar file-type icons, status icon polish, and the standards doc
description: Codify the issue-layout QoL patterns as project-wide UX standards and extend them: file-type icons (diagram, HTML artifact — markdown stays unmarked) on the right side of both the docs sidebar and the issues sub-doc tree with hover tooltips; complete the subtask status icon set (blue --color-info half-circle for in-progress, verify blocked); legend into the Guide panel + user-guide; a dev-docs UX-standards page referenced from CLAUDE.md.
author: sidhantha
